The '''Moshaw Dark Star''' was a [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] located on the edge of the<ref name="PP" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]. The [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] known as the [[Dark Star Hellions/Legends|Dark Star Hellions]] originated in the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] neighboring the black hole.<ref name="PP" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Moshaw Dark Star was first mentioned in ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', a [[1997]] sourcebook written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="PP" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the black hole in grid square M-18.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
